game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Bounty Of One: Premium**: This fast-paced roguelite bullet hell game puts players in control of a Wild West hero, using a virtual joystick on the left side of the screen to move and dodge endless hordes of bounty hunters. The hero automatically attacks the closest enemy with their equipped weapon, while players focus on strategic positioning and avoiding incoming projectiles and enemy collisions. Defeated enemies drop experience points, which, upon collection, level up the hero and present players with a choice of three random upgrades from a pool of active abilities, passive buffs, and weapon enhancements. Each run features procedurally generated enemy waves that increase in density and speed every 30 seconds, culminating in challenging boss fights every 5 minutes, with the objective being to survive as long as possible and the run ending when the hero's health reaches zero.
game_info.description: Survive as long as possible in this Wild West bullet hell! Your hero automatically shoots at nearby enemies while you focus on dodging attacks. Collect experience orbs from fallen foes to level up and choose powerful upgrades. Enemy waves grow fiercer every 30 seconds, and deadly bosses appear every 5 minutes. Master positioning and upgrade selection to maximize your survival time!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your hero in four directions
Space: Select upgrade choice 1 (when leveling up)
Shift: Select upgrade choice 2 (when leveling up)
Z: Select upgrade choice 3 (when leveling up)
Enter: Start the game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (return to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic movement and combat mechanics. This test validates that the hero can move, auto-attack enemies, collect experience orbs, and survive basic encounters.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move in circular patterns to avoid enemies while collecting experience orbs. Prioritize staying away from clusters of enemies and projectiles. Select damage upgrades when available to clear enemies faster.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test should successfully navigate the arena, defeat multiple enemies, collect experience orbs, level up at least once, and survive for a reasonable duration without taking excessive damage.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing optimal survival strategy and win condition. This validates the hero can survive long enough to trigger and defeat a boss, demonstrating mastery of all game mechanics.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Use intelligent positioning to maintain distance from enemies while maximizing attack uptime. Prioritize health and defense upgrades early, then focus on damage. Dodge boss projectiles with calculated movements and defeat the first boss to achieve victory.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The test should survive 5 minutes, encounter the first boss, and defeat it to reach GAME_OVER_WIN state. This demonstrates complete mastery of movement, combat, upgrade selection, and boss mechanics.
